falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above 5000 (a key resistance level) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained break above this level would indicate bullish momentum contradicting the expected bottom pattern, invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume on the NASDAQ exceeds 200% of the 30-day average volume within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a spike in volume would suggest strong buying pressure inconsistent with the current HOLD verdict and blowoff score dynamics.

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX volatility index rises above 45 (a threshold indicating extreme market fear) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A VIX spike this high would signal destabilizing volatility, directly contradicting the pattern's implied stability and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
